cases.title: TS-21f: Instructor nav audit — zero /admin links in layout chrome per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; seeded Instructor user with standard session:read and report:read permissions
API and web app running; Instructor authenticated via session cookie
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Instructor session and assert role Instructor
Navigate or request instructor role home route /sessions
Collect all nav descriptors exposed by API or SSR payload if available
Assert no nav item route matches /admin or /admin/* pattern
GET /api/v1/admin/users (or equivalent admin-only list endpoint) with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden per roles-permissions §2.5
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-21f and AC-18a satisfied: instructor session exposes only instructor-scoped destinations; zero admin route prefixes in permitted nav; direct admin API denied

cases.title: filterPermittedNav omits nav descriptors when user lacks required permission
preconditions: Nav descriptor catalog loaded from roles-permissions §2.3a (InstructorLayout and AdminLayout items)
filterPermittedNav or usePermittedNav pure function available for integration test without browser
steps: Invoke filterPermittedNav with permission set [session:read] only (Instructor without report:read)
Assert returned items include Buổi học → /sessions
Assert no item with route /reports or label Báo cáo present in result array
Invoke filterPermittedNav with full TrainingOfficeAdmin permission set
Assert all admin sidebar items from §2.3a present including /admin/users, /admin/reports, /admin/export
Invoke with Student permission set [checkin:submit, attendance:read (self)]
Assert zero items with route prefix /admin or /sessions
cases.expected: Tag-specific component hint satisfied: usePermittedNav omits unauthorized nav items from filtered descriptor list; cross-role prefixes never co-mingle per BR-14

cases.title: RoleHomeHub card catalog filtered by permission — admin cards omitted when policy:write absent
preconditions: RoleHomeHub card descriptor table mapped to permissions per page-list §5.0 and common-ui-components §2.20
filterHubCards(permissions[]) module API or equivalent integration boundary
steps: Invoke filterHubCards with full admin permissions including policy:write
Assert cards for Quản lý người dùng, Danh sách lớp, Báo cáo, Xuất CSV, and Chính sách all returned
Invoke filterHubCards with admin permissions excluding policy:write
Assert Chính sách card absent from result (not present with disabled flag)
Assert remaining cards href values point only to routes user still holds permission for
Invoke filterHubCards for Instructor with session:read and report:read
Assert Tạo buổi học mới and Báo cáo (or Báo cáo điểm danh) cards present per AC-18d
cases.expected: Module-integration at hub card boundary: permission-filtered quick links match FR-18; unauthorized destinations omitted from DOM descriptor set per BR-14

cases.title: Authenticated GET / redirects each role to documented role home hub
preconditions: Bootstrap complete; seeded Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin accounts
API session cookies obtainable for each role
steps: Authenticate as Student and GET /api/v1/ or follow SPA root with session
Assert redirect target is /check-in per page-list §1 default landing
Authenticate as Instructor and repeat GET /
Assert redirect target is /sessions
Authenticate as TrainingOfficeAdmin and repeat GET /
Assert redirect target is /admin hub per FR-18 and AC-18e
cases.expected: AC-18e and http-contract satisfied: root route resolves to role-specific home hub per page-list role table

cases.title: Student direct access to admin user list returns HTTP 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Student user exists with active session
At least one admin user record exists in database
steps: GET /api/v1/users or GET /api/v1/admin/users (admin user list endpoint per API design) with Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response body errorCode Forbidden
Assert response does not include institution-wide user roster rows
cases.expected: AC-18b API contract: student denied admin user management; aligns with ForbiddenPage behavior for /admin/users direct URL

cases.title: RBAC negative matrix: non-admin roles denied all /admin/* API surfaces
preconditions: RbacNegativeMatrix fixture per testing-plan §5 with Student and Instructor sessions
Representative admin endpoints: user list, roster list, reports summary, CSV export
steps: For each admin endpoint in matrix, invoke with Student session
Assert HTTP 403 for every request; no partial data leakage
Repeat matrix with Instructor session for /admin/users, /admin/rosters, /admin/reports, /admin/export
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden or ExportNotAllowed per roles-permissions §2.5
Assert Instructor retains 200 on scoped instructor routes /sessions and /reports when assigned
cases.expected: NFR-11 rbac-negative coverage for AC-18: non-admin roles cannot access admin API surfaces; instructor retains scoped instructor permissions

cases.title: Boundary: Instructor without report:read omits Báo cáo from sidebar and hub descriptors
preconditions: Instructor test user provisioned with session:read only (report:read explicitly revoked or absent)
filterPermittedNav and filterHubCards integration APIs available
steps: Load Instructor permission set and assert report:read not granted
Invoke filterPermittedNav for InstructorLayout
Assert sidebar contains Buổi học only; Báo cáo item absent
Invoke filterHubCards for /sessions instructor hub
Assert Tạo buổi học mới present but Báo cáo / Báo cáo điểm danh card absent
Direct GET /reports with Instructor session returns 403 ReportAccessDenied or Forbidden
cases.expected: AC-18d boundary inverse: instructor hub and sidebar omit report destinations when report:read missing; direct URL still denied per BR-14

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: admin /admin hub NavCards deep-link to permitted routes
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated in browser with full admin permission set
Bootstrap complete; admin hub page reachable
steps: Navigate browser to /admin
Assert RoleHomeHub renders with QuickActionGrid of NavCard components
For each visible NavCard, read href attribute and click card
Assert navigation lands on matching /admin/* route without 403
Assert destination page renders expected layout chrome (AdminLayout sidebar active item)
Navigate back to /admin and repeat for all visible cards
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: AC-18c admin hub cards provide working deep links to permitted admin workflow routes

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: authenticated admin lands on /admin hub with permission-filtered cards
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session in browser
Test admin user configured with permissions excluding policy:write (or use env fixture)
steps: Log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin and assert post-login redirect lands on /admin
Assert RoleHomeHub heading and workflow cards visible for permitted destinations
Inspect DOM: assert Chính sách NavCard absent when policy:write missing
Inspect AdminLayout sidebar: assert Chính sách nav link absent from DOM (not disabled)
Assert cards for Quản lý người dùng and Báo cáo still visible when respective permissions held
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: admin lands on permission-filtered /admin hub; unauthorized cards omitted per BR-14 not merely disabled

cases.title: Tag-specific browser-journey: instructor layout chrome contains zero href matching /admin
preconditions: Instructor user authenticated in browser
Instructor on /sessions instructor role home
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions
Query all anchor elements within InstructorLayout chrome (sidebar, header, bottom nav, RoleHomeHub)
Assert zero href attributes match /admin or /admin/* regex
Open mobile drawer sidebar if viewport < md and re-scan anchors
Direct navigate browser to /admin/users
Assert ForbiddenPage rendered inside RootLayout without AdminLayout sidebar or admin nav links in chrome
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: AC-18a and TS-21f — instructor chrome contains zero /admin links; forbidden direct URL shows 403 page without nav leak

cases.title: Student direct URL /admin/users shows ForbiddenPage with no admin links in student chrome
preconditions: Student authenticated in browser on /check-in or /history
steps: While logged in as Student, inspect StudentLayout chrome for any /admin href
Assert zero /admin links in bottom nav and page chrome per AC-18b
Navigate browser directly to /admin/users
Assert ForbiddenPage with Vietnamese permission message visible
Assert StudentLayout (not AdminLayout) wraps the page
Assert no admin sidebar items rendered anywhere in DOM
cases.expected: AC-18b browser outcome: student forbidden on admin route; student chrome never displayed admin navigation links

cases.title: Instructor with report:read sees Tạo buổi học mới and Báo cáo links on /sessions hub
preconditions: Instructor authenticated with session:read and report:read per standard role matrix
No blocking active-session-only gating on hub cards
steps: Navigate authenticated Instructor to /sessions
Assert RoleHomeHub section visible above session list
Assert NavCard or link with text Tạo buổi học mới present and href targets session creation route
Assert NavCard or link with text Báo cáo or Báo cáo điểm danh present with href /reports
Click Báo cáo card and assert navigation to /reports without ForbiddenPage
cases.expected: AC-18d satisfied: instructor role home hub shows permitted workflow quick links for session creation and reports

cases.title: Authenticated user visiting / redirects to role home hub per role table
preconditions: Seeded accounts for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin
Bootstrap complete (needsSetup false)
steps: Log in as Student, navigate browser to /
Assert URL becomes /check-in
Log out; log in as Instructor, navigate to /
Assert URL becomes /sessions
Log out; log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin, navigate to /
Assert URL becomes /admin with RoleHomeHub visible
cases.expected: AC-18e browser outcome: root route redirects each authenticated role to documented role home per page-list §1 and user flows §13 step 1

cases.title: Flow A post-login: admin and instructor land on role hubs before workshop workflow continues
preconditions: Flow A seed data: admin, instructor, and student accounts from testing-plan §6 Flow A step 1
Empty or seeded roster per Flow A prerequisites
steps: Authenticate TrainingOfficeAdmin via POST /api/v1/auth/login
Assert session established and default landing route is /admin hub not /admin/users
Authenticate Instructor via login endpoint
Assert default landing is /sessions with instructor nav only
Continue Flow A: instructor creates session — verify hub did not expose admin paths during navigation
Authenticate Student and assert landing /check-in with student-only chrome
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle includes correct role home hub routing at login; permission-gated nav persists through early Flow A steps per FR-18
